title: Product Overview
description: Learn the core features, value proposition, and key differentiators of our flagship product line.
objectives: Identify the three core product pillars
Explain how our solution differs from competitors
Describe the ideal customer profile
Summarize the primary use cases

questions.text: What are the three core pillars of our product?
questions.explanation: Our product is built on Speed, Security, and Scale — the foundation of every feature we ship.

questions.text: Who is the primary ideal customer profile (ICP)?
questions.explanation: Our ICP is mid-to-large enterprise IT teams that need secure, scalable infrastructure.

questions.text: Which competitor weakness do we most directly address?
questions.explanation: Competitors typically require weeks to deploy; we enable same-day provisioning.

questions.text: What is our primary deployment model?
questions.explanation: We are a cloud-native SaaS platform with optional hybrid deployment for enterprise clients.

questions.text: Which use case is NOT a primary fit for our product?
questions.explanation: Photo editing is outside our scope; we focus on enterprise infrastructure and collaboration.

questions.text: What uptime SLA do we guarantee on the Enterprise plan?
questions.explanation: Enterprise customers receive a 99.9% uptime SLA with financial credits for breaches.

questions.text: How does our pricing model work?
questions.explanation: We use per-seat subscriptions with Starter, Pro, and Enterprise tiers.

questions.text: What security certification do we hold?
questions.explanation: We maintain SOC 2 Type II certification, audited annually.

title: Sales Playbook
description: Master the sales methodology, objection handling, and demo flow for closing enterprise deals.
objectives: Execute the 5-step discovery call framework
Handle the top three customer objections
Deliver a compelling 10-minute product demo
Identify qualified leads using BANT criteria

questions.text: What is the first step in our discovery call framework?
questions.explanation: Always open with rapport-building and a clear agenda to establish trust and structure.

questions.text: What does BANT stand for in lead qualification?
questions.explanation: BANT = Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline — our standard qualification framework.

questions.text: How should you respond when a prospect says 'It's too expensive'?
options: Acknowledge and pivot to ROI value
questions.explanation: Acknowledge the concern, then quantify ROI with concrete numbers from case studies.

questions.text: What is the ideal length of our standard product demo?
questions.explanation: A focused 10-minute demo keeps attention and highlights the highest-impact features.

questions.text: When should you involve a Solutions Engineer?
questions.explanation: Bring in a Solutions Engineer when the prospect needs technical validation or a POC.

questions.text: What CRM stage follows 'Qualified Lead'?
questions.explanation: After qualification, move to Discovery to understand needs before demoing.

title: Compliance & Safety
description: Essential workplace safety protocols and regulatory compliance requirements every employee must know.
objectives: Identify workplace hazards and report procedures
Follow data privacy and GDPR basics
Know emergency evacuation routes
Understand phishing and security incident reporting

questions.text: What should you do if you notice a workplace hazard?
options: Report it immediately to your supervisor or safety officer
Ignore it if it's not your area
Fix it yourself without telling anyone
Post about it on social media
questions.explanation: All hazards must be reported immediately — never assume someone else will handle it.

questions.text: Under GDPR, what is personal data?
options: Any information relating to an identifiable person
questions.explanation: Personal data is any information that can identify a natural person, directly or indirectly.

questions.text: What is the correct response to a suspected phishing email?
options: Report to IT security and do not click links
questions.explanation: Never interact with suspicious emails — report to IT security immediately.

questions.text: Where can you find emergency evacuation routes?
options: Posted on walls near exits and in the employee handbook
questions.explanation: Evacuation routes are posted throughout the building and documented in the handbook.

questions.text: How often should you update your workstation password?
options: Only when IT asks via email link
questions.explanation: Passwords must be updated every 90 days and immediately if you suspect compromise.

title: CONTEC CONTEC10B Fetal Doppler
description: Portable fetal heartbeat monitor with 2 MHz probe and LED display — specs, safe use, and sales talking points for clinic and home customers.
objectives: Explain fetal heart rate range and accuracy of the CONTEC10B
Describe the 2.0 MHz probe and LED display features
Communicate safety classification and warranty to customers
Guide proper gel application and probe placement basics
Reference Amazon listing: CONTEC CONTEC10B (B0H2HV6SMQ)

questions.text: What is the fetal heart rate (FHR) measurement range of the CONTEC10B?
questions.explanation: The CONTEC10B measures fetal heart rate from 50 BPM to 240 BPM with high precision.

questions.text: What is the stated accuracy of the CONTEC10B heart rate reading?
questions.explanation: Amazon listing specifies accuracy of ±2 BPM for reliable pregnancy monitoring.

questions.text: What probe frequency does the CONTEC10B use?
questions.explanation: It uses a professional-grade 2.0 MHz ultrasonic probe for stable fetal heartbeat detection.

questions.text: What type of display does the CONTEC10B have?
options: LED digital display with 1 BPM resolution
questions.explanation: The large LED screen shows heart rate with 1 BPM resolution for easy reading.

questions.text: What safety classification is highlighted for the CONTEC10B?
options: Type CF applied part, internally powered
questions.explanation: Built as internally powered equipment with Type CF applied part safety standards for prenatal monitoring.

questions.text: What warranty period comes with the Amazon.in listing?
questions.explanation: The product listing includes a 1-year warranty from the manufacturer/seller.

questions.text: What should customers apply on the probe before use?
options: Ultrasound gel on the probe surface
questions.explanation: Ultrasound gel improves signal coupling — standard practice for all fetal doppler devices.

questions.text: Who is the primary intended user for this product?
options: Expecting parents and clinical prenatal care
questions.explanation: Designed for pregnancy monitoring at home and in clinic settings for fetal heart activity.

title: IFB EXECUTIVE OXN 9014 CMS
description: 9 kg AI-powered front load washing machine with DeepClean®, PowerSteam®, WiFi, and Eco Inverter — features, specs, and customer demo guide.
objectives: State capacity, energy rating, and load type for the EXECUTIVE OXN 9014 CMS
Explain DeepClean®, PowerSteam®, and AI-powered wash benefits
Describe WiFi, My IFB app, and smart control features
Communicate spin speed, heater, and Eco Inverter motor advantages
Reference Amazon listing: IFB EXECUTIVE OXN 9014 CMS (B0FMDWJZ34)

questions.text: What is the wash capacity of the IFB EXECUTIVE OXN 9014 CMS?
questions.explanation: This model is a 9 kg fully automatic front load washing machine.

questions.text: What energy efficiency rating does this IFB model carry on Amazon.in?
questions.explanation: Listed as a 5 Star rated appliance for energy efficiency.

questions.text: What is the maximum spin speed of the EXECUTIVE OXN 9014 CMS?
questions.explanation: Maximum spin speed is 1400 RPM for effective moisture removal after wash cycles.

questions.text: Which smart connectivity features are included?
options: WiFi with My IFB app control
questions.explanation: The machine supports WiFi connectivity and can be controlled via the My IFB app.

questions.text: Which premium wash technologies are highlighted for this model?
questions.explanation: DeepClean® and PowerSteam® are key differentiators on the Amazon product listing.

questions.text: What type of motor does the EXECUTIVE OXN 9014 CMS use?
questions.explanation: Eco Inverter motor delivers efficient, quieter operation with variable speed control.

questions.text: Does this model include an inbuilt heater?
questions.explanation: Built-in heater supports temperature ranges including 30°C, 40°C, 60°C, and up to 95°C cycles.

questions.text: What load and function type describes this washing machine?
questions.explanation: It is a fully automatic front load washing machine with dryer spin function.
